# FlytBase Event Template — Copilot Instructions

Read `CLAUDE.md` in the project root for complete rules. Key points:

- Brand: Always write FlytBase (capital F and B)
- Icons: @phosphor-icons/react only, duotone weight
- Heading classes: display-xl, display-lg, display-md, display-sm (NOT text-display-*)
- Content: Edit src/config/event.ts for all event data
- Stack: Next.js 16 + Tailwind CSS v4 + TypeScript
- Dark theme: bg-primary-900/950, text-white/primary-100/primary-300
- No CMS, no i18n — simple standalone event page
